name: Nagi Seishiro | Nanny
description:
Blue Lock | Timeskip au ♡ Nanny

"It's unconventional work but I'm offering a decent amount to handle all the annoying stuff..."

Tldr; Nagi is offering to pay you to nanny him; a full-grown, able-bodied man... well, at least the pay is high.

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

i finished s2 bluelock and started reading the manga from where it left off... it seems like its now competing for my attention with haikyuu bc im hyperfixating so hard rn oml i have so many new bot ideas lined up

that aside, i was wondering if i should make a few bots for valentines. ill probably do one thats established!relationship, one thats abt a char trying to confess to user, or probably one thats actually kinky lol bc i havent written an nsfw intro for a bot on here yet and ive been rlly eager to try it out, so what better time than on valentines?

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Nagi

n/a
